languages.text: "О, как только я постигну ответы на терзающие меня вопросы, я тотчас же покину это ложе и восстановлю ток Движущей Силы в отсеке, не сомневайтесь. А теперь еще один перерыв, Вольный Торговец — мне нужно провести экскавацию сердечного импланта. Нунциус, обрати внимание на работу атриовентрикулярного узла, будь любезен". {n}Один из гибких мехадендритов ныряет вглубь груди Эоганна, аккуратно извлекая из нее аугментированное сердце.{/n}

"Oh, as soon as I obtain the answers to my questions, I will rise from this throne and restore the Motive Force to the compartment, rest assured. And now I beg another pause, Rogue Trader — I must excavate the heart implant. Nuncius, kindly monitor the functioning of the atrioventricular node, if you would." {n}One of the flexible mechadendrites dives deep into Eogunn's chest, carefully extracting the augmented heart.{/n}

А теперь еще один перерыв, Вольный Торговец — мне нужно провести экскавацию сердечного импланта. Нунциус, обрати внимание на работу атриовентрикулярного узла, будь любезен". {n}Один из гибких мехадендритов ныряет вглубь груди Эоганна, аккуратно извлекая из нее аугментированное сердце.{/n}

Nuncius, kindly monitor the functioning of the atrioventricular node, if you would." {n}One of the flexible mechadendrites dives deep into Eogunn's chest, carefully extracting the augmented heart.{/n}

"Oh, as soon as I obtain the answers to my questions, I will rise from this throne and restore the Motive Force to the compartment, rest assured. And now I beg another pause, Rogue Trader — I must excavate the heart implant. Nuncius, kindly monitor the functioning of the atrioventricular node, if you would." {n}One of the flexible mechadendrites dives deep into Eogunn's chest, carefully extracting the augmented heart.{/n}

languages.text: "Oh, sobald ich die Antworten auf meine Fragen habe, werde ich mich von diesem Thron erheben und die Antriebskraft des Moduls wiederherstellen, keine Sorge. Und nun bitte ich Euch um eine weitere Pause, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin} ... ich muss das Herzimplantat entnehmen. Nuncius, seid so freundlich und überwacht die Funktion des Atrioventrikularknotens, ja?" {n}Einer der flexiblen Mechadendriten dringt tiefer in Eogunns Brust ein und fördert vorsichtig das augmentierte Herz zutage.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Oh, as soon as I obtain the answers to my questions, I will rise from this throne and restore the Motive Force to the compartment, rest assured. And now I beg another pause, Rogue Trader — I must excavate the heart implant. traits.locale_text: "Oh, sobald ich die Antworten auf meine Fragen habe, werde ich mich von diesem Thron erheben und die Antriebskraft des Moduls wiederherstellen, keine Sorge. Und nun bitte ich Euch um eine weitere Pause, {mf|Freihändler|Freihändlerin} ... ich muss das Herzimplantat entnehmen. Nuncius, seid so freundlich und überwacht die Funktion des Atrioventrikularknotens, ja?" {n}Einer der flexiblen Mechadendriten dringt tiefer in Eogunns Brust ein und fördert vorsichtig das augmentierte Herz zutage.{/n}

languages.text: « Dès que j'aurai obtenu les réponses à mes questions, je me lèverai de ce fauteuil et je rétablirai la Force Motrice du compartiment, ne vous inquiétez pas. Sur ce, je vous prie de patienter encore un peu. Je dois extraire l'implant cardiaque. Nuncius, surveille le fonctionnement du nœud atrioventriculaire, je te prie. » {n}L'une des mécadendrites souples plonge dans la poitrine d'Eogunn pour en extraire délicatement le cœur augmenté.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Oh, as soon as I obtain the answers to my questions, I will rise from this throne and restore the Motive Force to the compartment, rest assured. And now I beg another pause, Rogue Trader — I must excavate the heart implant. Nuncius, kindly monitor the functioning of the atrioventricular node, if you would." {n}One of the flexible mechadendrites dives deep into Eogunn's chest, carefully extracting the augmented heart.{/n}

Sur ce, je vous prie de patienter encore un peu. Je dois extraire l'implant cardiaque. Nuncius, surveille le fonctionnement du nœud atrioventriculaire, je te prie. » {n}L'une des mécadendrites souples plonge dans la poitrine d'Eogunn pour en extraire délicatement le cœur augmenté.{/n}

languages.text: “请放心，一旦获得答案，我便会离开这王座，恢复舱室的源力。现在，还请稍候片刻，行商浪人——我必须摘除植入物心脏。努恩修斯，劳烦你监测房室结的运作。”{n}一根灵活的机械触须深入伊奥贡的胸腔，小心翼翼地取出那颗植入物心脏。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Oh, as soon as I obtain the answers to my questions, I will rise from this throne and restore the Motive Force to the compartment, rest assured. And now I beg another pause, Rogue Trader — I must excavate the heart implant. Nuncius, kindly monitor the functioning of the atrioventricular node, if you would." {n}One of the flexible mechadendrites dives deep into Eogunn's chest, carefully extracting the augmented heart.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “请放心，一旦获得答案，我便会离开这王座，恢复舱室的源力。现在，还请稍候片刻，行商浪人——我必须摘除植入物心脏。努恩修斯，劳烦你监测房室结的运作。”{n}一根灵活的机械触须深入伊奥贡的胸腔，小心翼翼地取出那颗植入物心脏。{/n}

languages.text: «Ah, en cuanto consiga las respuestas de mis preguntas, me levantaré de este trono y restableceré la Fuerza Motriz del compartimento, se lo aseguro. Ahora, le ruego que me permita una breve interrupción, Comerciante Independiente. Debo extraer el implante cardíaco. Nuncius, vigile el funcionamiento del nodo atrioventricular, por favor». {n}Una de las flexibles mecadendritas se adentra en el pecho de Eogunn, extrayendo cuidadosamente el corazón aumentado.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Oh, as soon as I obtain the answers to my questions, I will rise from this throne and restore the Motive Force to the compartment, rest assured. And now I beg another pause, Rogue Trader — I must excavate the heart implant. Nuncius, kindly monitor the functioning of the atrioventricular node, if you would." {n}One of the flexible mechadendrites dives deep into Eogunn's chest, carefully extracting the augmented heart.{/n}

Ahora, le ruego que me permita una breve interrupción, Comerciante Independiente. Debo extraer el implante cardíaco. Nuncius, vigile el funcionamiento del nodo atrioventricular, por favor». {n}Una de las flexibles mecadendritas se adentra en el pecho de Eogunn, extrayendo cuidadosamente el corazón aumentado.{/n}

languages.text: 「ああ、問いの答えを得次第、私はこの玉座から立ち上がり、区画に原動力を回復させよう、安心したまえ。そして今、もう一度の休止を願う、ローグ・トレーダー――私は心臓のインプラントを掘り出さねばならない。ヌンキウス、よろしければ房室結節の機能を監視していてくれ。」{n}柔軟なメカデンドライトの一本がエオガンの胸の奥深くへ潜り込み、強化された心臓を慎重に取り出す。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Oh, as soon as I obtain the answers to my questions, I will rise from this throne and restore the Motive Force to the compartment, rest assured. And now I beg another pause, Rogue Trader — I must excavate the heart implant. Nuncius, kindly monitor the functioning of the atrioventricular node, if you would." {n}One of the flexible mechadendrites dives deep into Eogunn's chest, carefully extracting the augmented heart.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「ああ、問いの答えを得次第、私はこの玉座から立ち上がり、区画に原動力を回復させよう、安心したまえ。そして今、もう一度の休止を願う、ローグ・トレーダー――私は心臓のインプラントを掘り出さねばならない。ヌンキウス、よろしければ房室結節の機能を監視していてくれ。」{n}柔軟なメカデンドライトの一本がエオガンの胸の奥深くへ潜り込み、強化された心臓を慎重に取り出す。{/n}

languages.text: "Sorularımın cevaplarını alır almaz bu tahttan kalkacağım ve kompartımana Devinim Gücü'nü geri vereceğim. İçiniz rahat olsun. Şimdi bir ara daha rica ediyorum Hür Tacir... Kalp implantını çıkarmalıyım. Nuncius, rica etsem atriyoventriküler düğümün işleyişini izler misin?" {n}Esnek mekadentritlerden biri, Eogunn'un göğsünün derinliklerine dalarak ogmentli kalbi dikkatle çıkarıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Oh, as soon as I obtain the answers to my questions, I will rise from this throne and restore the Motive Force to the compartment, rest assured. And now I beg another pause, Rogue Trader — I must excavate the heart implant.
